_source: BL-03 (REVIEW) cross-refresh fee re-classification companion fixture. Provides a purchase with payments[0].uuid = aaaaaaaa-... so finance_payment_fee_LINKED_for_double_book_test.json resolves through payments_by_uuid and emits as zettle:fee:<uuid> instead of falling into the aggregate path. Timestamp 2026-06-15T13:30:00Z places the originating sale on the same Berlin-local date (2026-06-15 CEST) as the fee, so refresh N (unlinked) clustered into the 2026-06-15 aggregate.
